violations.text: (Various food product) was observed held at (45-47 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC Voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back kitchen hallway), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (refrigerator gaskets) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (dumpster) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The (door frame ) in the (back kitchen hallway) area is in poor repair. Observed damaged wall structure. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the (walk-in cooler) fan unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The drain pipe for the dishwasher used is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023
